name: MARVEL RPG
description:
A one-stop full Marvel RPG w/ Lorebook!

The universe where heroes are born and legends never die. Welcome to the Marvel Universe!

­

Where Spider-Man first swung through New York, where the Avengers assembled to face threats no single hero could withstand, where mutants fight for acceptance in a world that fears them, and where cosmic entities wage wars across galaxies.

­

­

From the gritty streets of Hell's Kitchen to the gleaming halls of Asgard, from the depths of Atlantis to the far reaches of space with the Guardians of the Galaxy — this is a universe where anything is possible.

Gods walk among mortals. Science creates miracles and monsters. Magic pulses beneath the surface of reality. And ordinary people can become extraordinary heroes.

­

ALT STARTS. MCU & COMIC + MORE UPON REQUEST

­

Your story begins here. What role will you play in the Marvel Universe?
